title: Limitless Vehicle
description: Adds a wide variety of vehicles, and allows players to create vehicles using the data pack
body: **Limitless Vehicle** is a universal vehicle mod that supports custom vehicle data packs. *** **Features:** * Excellent driving experience like War Thunder  * Highly accurate collision boxes * Realistic physics effects * Powerful figure box that can store and showcase any entity * Easy-to-develop vehicle data pack system supporting Bedrock models * Fully customizable decoration system supporting Bedrock models *** ### **Related Links** Related Vehicle Packs: * [\[LV\] Dragonrise](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/customization/limitless-vehicle-dragonrise)
